headline: Is Willis Towers Watson (WTW) Priced Attractive After Recent Insurance Sector Coverage Shift?
summary: If you are wondering whether Willis Towers Watson's current share price offers fair value or a margin of safety, the recent performance gives you some useful clues. The stock last closed at US$263.91, with returns of 5.2% over the past 7 days and 5.7% over the past 30 days. Year to date it is down 19.1% and the 1-year return is down 9.8%, compared with gains of 20.0% over 3 years and 18.6% over 5 years. Recent coverage has focused on how insurers are adapting their risk and advisory...

headline: Willis launches risk program for wood frame construction projects
summary: New solution delivers automatic coverage for wood frame projects across all 50 states and Washington, D.C.NEW YORK, June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Willis, a WTW business (NASDAQ: WTW), today announced the launch of its Wood Frame Follow Facility Builder’s Risk Program, a specialized solution designed to support new ground-up wood frame construction projects throughout the United States. headline: U.S. commercial insurance rates increase 2.5%, extending moderating trend
summary: Commercial Lines Insurance Pricing Survey: Q1 2026NEW YORK, June 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- U.S. commercial insurance rates increased 2.5% in the first quarter of 2026, marking a third consecutive quarter of moderating rate increases, according to the latest findings from WTW’s Commercial Lines Insurance Pricing Survey (CLIPS). headline: Is WTW's (WTW) New AI and Benefits Push Subtly Reframing Its Long-Term Advisory Edge?
summary: In early June 2026, Willis Towers Watson expanded its presence and offerings by securing a DFSA licence for WTW Investments (DIFC) Limited in Dubai and partnering with Everest Funeral Concierge UK to add 24/7 bereavement support to UK employee benefits, while also launching an AI Workforce Transformation solution built on proprietary job and skills data. Together, these moves highlight how WTW is using AI-driven advisory tools and enhanced benefit services to deepen client relationships...
